paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. was last reported at 6.65, with a change of 8.66% from the prior close and a change of -25.86% over a window of 21 sessions. The price as of date is July 21, 2026.

Recent news includes the announcement of Fermi Inc.'s second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, which is scheduled for August 13, 2026. There have been no new news articles in the last 24 hours. Other recent news includes the departure of CEO Toby Neugebauer and the resignation of director Miles Everson due to governance concerns.

There have been 25 total filings, including 1 Form 4 filing and 17 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and an 8-K form announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There was 1 new social post in the last 24 hours, mentioning the arrival of Siemens turbines at the Port of Houston.
